page_content:
Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

ARTT488 Advanced Special Topics in Graphic Design (1-3 Credits) Variable topics in Graphic Design theory and practice. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

ARTT489 Advanced Special Topics in Art (1-3 Credits)

Advanced studio art and theory within the context of a special topic. Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.
